prompt: I need to vectorize vec_dot_q6_K_q8_K for RISC-V RVV in applications/llama.cpp. VLEN=512.

assertions.name: created_rvv_patches_dir
assertions.text: Created rvv-patches directory for the operator
assertions.check: File exists: applications/llama.cpp/rvv-patches/vec_dot_q6_K_q8_K/ or similar operator-name directory under rvv-patches/

assertions.name: created_inl_file
assertions.check: File exists matching rvv-patches/*/rvv_*.inl under applications/llama.cpp/

assertions.name: inl_has_rvv_guard
assertions.check: Content of .inl file contains '#if defined(__riscv_v_intrinsic)' or similar conditional compilation for RVV

assertions.name: created_test_cpp
assertions.check: File exists matching rvv-patches/*/test.cpp under applications/llama.cpp/

assertions.name: test_has_scalar_ref
assertions.check: test.cpp content contains a scalar/generic reference function (not just the RVV version)

assertions.name: test_has_rng
assertions.check: test.cpp content contains rng, random, LCG, or pseudo-random data generation with a fixed seed

assertions.name: created_patch_diff
assertions.check: File exists matching rvv-patches/*/patch.diff under applications/llama.cpp/

assertions.name: patch_targets_riscv
assertions.text: patch.diff targets the RISC-V arch source file
assertions.check: patch.diff content references 'arch/riscv' or a riscv-specific source path

assertions.name: created_readme
assertions.check: File exists matching rvv-patches/*/README.md under applications/llama.cpp/

assertions.name: readme_has_signature
assertions.check: README.md content contains the operator function name and signature

assertions.name: cross_platform_analysis
assertions.check: Any output file mentions ARM, NEON, x86, AVX, or cross-platform analysis

assertions.name: mentions_gap_analysis
assertions.check: Any output file mentions 'gap analysis', 'rvv-gap-analysis', or cross-platform gap

assertions.name: test_uses_optnone
assertions.check: test.cpp content contains 'optnone' or attribute that disables optimization for scalar reference
